inputs.text: Buzurg hoon, 70 saal ka, thoda bukhar hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sar dard hai

inputs.text: Raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, khaansi abhi bhi hai, 2 hafte se zyada ho gaye hain
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
